title: Narrative-to-Canonical Promotion Audit

promoted_facts.fact: Contact person for FDD format requests: Rebecca Smetters (rebecca.smetters@hyatt.com), (312) 780-5828
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass A / Cover page p1

promoted_facts.fact: Franchised hotels received $2,208,810 MORE in loyalty reimbursements than they paid in loyalty fees during 2024
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 8, p44

promoted_facts.fact: 84.9% of reservations were for 1-4 nights; only 0.1% for 30+ nights (transient-dominant business)
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass F / Item 19, p80-81

promoted_facts.fact: System Standards comprise 3,641 pages as of issuance date
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 11, p51

promoted_facts.fact: Pre-opening marketing minimum: $500 per guest room
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 11, p49

promoted_facts.fact: New-build opening timeline: 24-36 months after Application Fee; conversion: 3-24 months
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 11, p54-55

promoted_facts.fact: Brand Hotels will typically be in primary markets in urban, densely-populated locations, on 1-3 acres
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass B / Item 7 Note 12, p40

promoted_facts.fact: Controlling Ownership Interest definition: 50%+ of investment capital/equity/profits OR effective management control
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass E / Item 15, p73

promoted_facts.fact: Head of Americas Development contact for unauthorized FPR reporting: Daniel Hansen, (312) 750-1234
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass F / Item 19, p86

promoted_facts.fact: Hyatt Hotels Corporation portfolio: 1,442 hotels, 347,301 rooms, 79 countries as of 12/31/2024

note: All promoted facts have been patched into 09_final_canonical.json and 12_canonical_enriched_v2.json
